# Agent contract — `koydo-anvil-releases`

> Cross-agent design + governance contract. Read this file FIRST on every UI task. This file mirrors the user's global `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` rules to non-Claude agents (Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Aider, Devin, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Amp, Jules, Zed AI, Continue, Roo Code, Factory, Q). Keep this file in sync.

**Repo:** `koydo-anvil-releases`
**Repo type:** `content`
**Origin:** `https://github.com/Koydo/koydo-anvil-releases.git`
**Last synced from canon:** `2026-06-01` (manifest sha: see `design-lock.json`)

---

## 1. Canonical design entry points (read in this order)

Every UI task starts here. Do NOT search the repo first.

1. `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` — user's global standing rules (Claude reads this automatically; non-Claude agents: read it explicitly).
2. **This file (`AGENTS.md`)** — repo-local rules and canon pin.
3. `~/koydo-design/INDEX.md` — design canon index.
4. `~/koydo-design/canon/KOYDO_BIBLE.md` — master bible (cite specific principle URLs, not the 162 KB file).
5. `./design-lock.json` — this repo's pin to a specific canon manifest SHA.

Stop searching as soon as the canon is identified. Do not browse `docs/`, `theme/`, or `assets/` looking for "similar" components — those are forbidden alternate canon paths.

---

## 2. Canonical import paths

These are the only allowed UI imports. Anything else fails `eslint-config-koydo` and the pre-commit Lefthook hook.

```ts
// ✅ ALLOWED
import { SiteFooter } from "@/components/koydo-footer";
import { SiteNav }    from "@/components/koydo-nav";
import { KoydoImage } from "@/components/koydo-image";
import { brandTokens, semanticTokens } from "@koydo/design/tokens";
import { cookieConsent } from "@/components/koydo-cookie-consent";

// ❌ FORBIDDEN — these are the drift patterns
import Footer from "./Footer";                    // local fork of canon footer
import { brandTokens } from "./theme";            // local theme fork
import Logo from "../../public/logo.svg";         // generic-name asset
import * as Brand from "./design-system";         // repo-local "design system"
import bible from "./docs/brand/KOYDO_BIBLE.md";  // alternate canon path
```

If you NEED a component that doesn't exist in canon, STOP. Open an issue against `~/koydo-design/` first. Do not improvise.

---

## 3. KAR-protected paths (do not modify without explicit owner approval)

Per `~/koydo-design/principles/kar-protected-paths.md`:

- Koydo Cortex
- KoydoSense
- Meridian

These exist as read-only references in the fleet. Any change requires the owner's explicit greenlight in writing.

---

## 4. Forbidden asset filenames

Per `~/koydo-design/principles/asset-naming.md` v2 (binding ALL AGENTS ALL MODELS):

**Banned stems (case-insensitive, with or without numeric suffix):**

`icon` · `logo` · `wordmark` · `favicon` · `hero` · `image` · `img` · `images` · `banner` · `bg` · `background` · `photo` · `pic` · `picture` · `asset` · `assets` · `default` · `new` · `final` · `temp` · `tmp` · `test` · `copy` · `screenshot` · `frame` · `export` · `download` · `unnamed` · `artboard` · `group` · `vector` · `shape` · `untitled`

**Required naming format:**

```
koydo-<scope>-<app>[-<locale>]-<surface>-<descriptor>[-<size>][-<density>][-<version>][.canon].<ext>
```

`<scope>` ∈ `{brand, app, category-<tier>}`. Examples:
- `koydo-brand-wordmark-primary.canon.svg`
- `koydo-app-cdl-en-landing-hero-truck-sunrise-v1.canon.webp`
- `koydo-category-junior-mascot-fennec-wave-v1.canon.webp`

Platform-mandated exceptions: `AppIcon.appiconset/`, `ic_launcher*` in Android mipmap dirs, `favicon.ico` at web root.

---

## 5. No SVG for imagery

Per `~/koydo-design/principles/no-svg-for-imagery.md`:

- SVG allowed: icons ≤ 64×64, progress/indicator tooling, the Koydo wordmark vector source, math/scientific diagrams, official platform social icons.
- SVG forbidden: hero illustrations, mascots, backgrounds, scene art, storybook art, any image > 64×64 or > 50 KB SVG file.

Everything else ships as PNG/WebP raster from a single high-resolution master in R2 with Cloudflare Images named variants for device classes.

---

## 6. Hash-locked canon components

Per `~/koydo-design/principles/hash-locked-canonical-components.md`:

Synced canon paths in this repo:

| Component | Consumer path | Sync script |
|---|---|---|
| Site footer | `src/components/koydo-footer/` | `node ~/koydo-design/scripts/sync-koydo-footer.mjs --apply --target=koydo-anvil-releases` |
| Site nav (Phase 2) | `src/components/koydo-nav/` | `node ~/koydo-design/scripts/sync-koydo-nav.mjs --apply --target=koydo-anvil-releases` |
| Tokens | `src/styles/koydo-tokens.css` | `node ~/koydo-design/scripts/sync-koydo-design-tokens.mjs --apply --target=koydo-anvil-releases` |

Each synced directory carries a `.koydo-canon-frozen` sentinel. Lefthook pre-commit refuses any commit touching these without `KOYDO_CANON_OVERRIDE=1` (owner-only).

If canon advances and this repo is out of sync, run the relevant `sync-*.mjs` BEFORE making the edit, then bump `./design-lock.json`. Do not hand-edit synced files.

---

## 7. Build + deploy discipline

Per `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md`:

- ✅ **Commit + push on every task completion** to `origin/master` (Koydo/ org only).
- ❌ **No cloud builds.** No `vercel build` triggering deploys, no GitHub Actions builds/tests/deploys, no cloud cron. All builds, tests, lints, codegen run locally.
- ✅ **HEREDOC commit messages** with `Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>`.
- ❌ Never push to `robertwaltos/` from this Mac. The `robertwaltos/` URLs are GitHub redirects only.

---

## 8. Destructive-change protocol

Per `~/koydo-design/principles/destructive-change-protocol.md`:

Before any delete (files, branches, table rows, components, assets):

1. Three independent agent perspectives must concur the delete is correct.
2. Print a `DESTRUCTIVE ACTION` block summarizing what will be removed.
3. Ask the owner explicitly. Do not delete on inferred authorization.

---

## 9. Escalation

When canon disagrees with what this repo needs:

- DO update canon first (`~/koydo-design/`), then update this repo.
- DO NOT update this repo to diverge from canon.
- DO NOT silently ignore the divergence.

Owner contact: `admin@koydo.app`. Session handoff file: `~/koydo-handoffs/YYYY-MM-DD-<topic>-handoff.md`.

---

## 10. Required local state

This file is checked at agent startup. Required companions:

- `./design-lock.json` — manifest SHA pin
- `./lefthook.yml` — pre-commit hook config that runs `verify-design-lock.mjs`, `audit-asset-names.mjs`, `audit-svg-imagery.mjs`
- `./CODEOWNERS` (when on GitHub) — routes design-canon paths to `@koydo/design-canon`

When this file's `Last synced from canon` is older than 14 days, run `~/koydo-design/scripts/propagate-design-ssot.mjs --target=koydo-anvil-releases` to refresh.
